results.title: Roundup: Vermont announces squad for Twin State Baseball Classic
results.description: WHITE RVIER JCT. — Eighteen of the top senior baseball players from the Green Mountain State will represent Vermont against New Hampshire in the upcoming 2026 Twin State Baseball Classic.

results.title: In any Dylan Larkin trade, Wings must get comparable center in return
results.description: DETROIT — Whenever it is Dylan Larkin gets traded, as is his request, the Red Wings will need a comparable top-line center in return.

results.title: WVU baseball is headed in the right direction
results.description: MORGANTOWN, W.Va. — Two swings of the bat. That is where we begin today, each carrying a message that speaks to where West Virginia baseball is and where it is

results.title: Green Bay’s Doug Gottlieb gets contract extension after improved performance in his second season
results.description: Moon, who hired Gottlieb in 2024, received his own contract extension Wednesday and now has a deal that also runs through 2031.

results.title: Toews, Stanley Cup and Olympic champ, retires
results.description: Jonathan Toews, a three-time Stanley Cup champion with the Blackhawks and two-time Olympic gold medalist with Canada, has announced his retirement.

results.title: As Blanca Quinonez gets healthy, she’s anticipates a better Year 2 with UConn women
results.description: Blanca Quinonez's promising freshman season was disrupted by a shoulder injury. After surgery, she's aiming to show UConn what she can do.
